title: 1.13.2 Default +
description: A Programmer Art continuation pack that stays true to the new default's theming
body:
# 1.13.2 Default +
1.13.2 Default + (abbreviated as 13De+) is a resource pack that redesigns textures added in version 1.13 and newer to match the original art style of Minecraft last used in 1.13.2 (now know as programmer art). 13De+ is a programmer art continuation, and is designed to be used on top of programmer art. 13De+ is designed to match with all of programmer art's textures and various art styles while staying true to the modern texture’s intentions. This pack isn't just for nostalgia, its a themed resource pack designed for regular gameplay! It also fixes several bugs in programmer art.

This pack uses pack overlays to make it compatible with multiple Minecraft versions and has custom menu panoramas that will change depending on what version you are playing on.

### Why in beta?
Many of the textures added to the pack 2-5 years ago don't have the same level of quality as the pack's newer textures, and I want to update these before release. This pack is still in beta because any textures could change at any time. Even though it is in beta, it's fully functional with no issues. 

## Compatibility Chart

| Version             | Currently Supported | Issues               |
|---------------------|---------------------|----------------------|
| 1.20.2+             | Yes                 | None                 |
| 1.20.0-1.20.1       | Yes                 | Overlay-dependent textures will not work, such as the 1.19.3 vex texture or panoramas |
| 1.13-1.19.4         | No                  | Some textures will not work or look correct |
| -1.12.2             | Never               | Pack will not work, but wouldn't do anything useful if it did |

<details>
<summary>Addons</summary>

Creating your own packs that are designed to be used as 13De+ addons is allowed and encouraged. Modifying other packs to be compatible with 13De+ and uploading them to Modrinth is also allowed and encouraged, with the pack author's permission of course; you do not need my permission to upload 13De+ addons. When creating an addon, it should have the term "13De+ Addon" somewhere in the description. The offical list of addons can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/collection/XDjZMtFm).

</details>
